summary: Iteration 31 - Fiches PDF Module Testing Complete. All 19 features tested: Backend APIs (100% pass - 16/16 tests) and Frontend UI (100% pass). CRUD operations for fiches work correctly, PDF generation returns valid PDFs, company settings CRUD works, and all frontend pages load with proper 2-column layout, expandable sections, dynamic form elements, and live preview.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - This is a React hydration warning from the visual editor wrapper, not affecting functionality

backend.POST /api/fiches - Create fiche: PASS - Creates fiche with all fields, returns 201 with id
backend.GET /api/fiches - List fiches: PASS - Returns fiches array with total count
backend.PUT /api/fiches/{id} - Update fiche: PASS - Updates fields and returns updated fiche
backend.POST /api/fiches/{id}/pdf - Generate PDF: PASS - Returns application/pdf with valid PDF content
backend.POST /api/fiches/preview-pdf - Preview P: PASS - Generates PDF from form data without saving
backend.GET /api/company-settings - Get settings: PASS - Returns settings (creates defaults if none)
backend.Auth required on all endpoints: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 without token
backend.Cleanup test data: PASS - TEST_ prefixed fiches cleaned up

frontend./admin/fiches page loads: PASS - FichesListPage with search, filter, create button
frontend.Add/remove documents dynamically: PASS - Document count increases on add
frontend.Add/remove steps dynamically: PASS - Step count increases on add
frontend.Live preview updates: PASS - Preview shows form changes in real-time
frontend.Save button creates fiche: PASS - Redirects to edit page, shows 'Fiche creee' toast
frontend.Generate PDF button downloads PDF: PASS - PDF downloaded with correct filename
frontend.Navigation dropdown has Fiches PDF secti: PASS - 'Mes fiches' and 'Nouvelle fiche' links present

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation with ReportLab is well-implemented with proper styling (orange/white/black theme)
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from responses using fiche_serial() helper
Company settings use singleton pattern with 'global' id for upsert operations
Frontend live preview is a styled HTML approximation, not actual PDF render (as expected)
All form inputs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Step ordering is correctly maintained with order field
seed_data_creation: Test fiches created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiches PDF module fully tested and working. Routes at /admin/fiches, /admin/fiches/create, /admin/fiches/:id/edit, /admin/parametres-entreprise. PDF generation uses ReportLab on backend. All endpoints require admin auth. Company settings use singleton document with id='global'. Existing fiche '28f2521c-9e64-47e0-a467-bbaa248ad191' may exist from initial testing.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB storage and ReportLab PDF generation
